title: Vanilla Enhanced Pro
description: Modpack, that enhances Minecraft, while keeping the vanilla aspect.
body:
​Introducing Vanilla Enhanced Pro, a meticulously curated modpack designed to enhance your classic Minecraft experience. This collection seamlessly integrates quality-of-life improvements and subtle expansions, enriching gameplay while preserving the core essence of vanilla Minecraft.​

### Features:

- **Performance Enhancements:** Experience smoother gameplay with optimized performance, reducing lag and improving frame rates.​
  
- **Quality of Life Improvements:** Benefit from various enhancements such as improved user interfaces, dynamic lighting, and more, all designed to make your gameplay more enjoyable.​
  
- **Enhanced Visuals:** Enjoy improved graphics with shader compatibility, bringing more vibrant and immersive visuals to your world.​
  
- **Better Animations:** Experience more fluid and realistic animations, adding a new level of immersion to your adventures.​
  
- **Easier Gameplay:** Utilize new tools and mechanics that streamline tasks and reduce repetitive actions, making your Minecraft journey more enjoyable.​
  
- **Consistent Updates:** Stay engaged with regular updates that introduce new features, improvements, and ensure compatibility with the latest Minecraft versions.​
  
Whether you're a seasoned explorer or new to the Minecraft universe, Vanilla Enhanced Pro offers a fresh and engaging experience that stays true to the game's original charm.​

_Note: This modpack is compatible with Minecraft Java Edition and requires a minimum of 4GB RAM for optimal performance.​_

Embark on a new adventure with Vanilla Enhanced Pro and rediscover the joy of Minecraft!

### Informations:

- All mods and resource packs are from Modrinth, except for a few listed in the links
  
- For a more immersive experience, use all the pre-installed resource packs
  
- No blocks, items, mobs or biomes got added, except for mob and playerheads
  
- The Modpack is completely survival friendly
  
- It is Fabric only!



Ressource pack links:

vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs

www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/sprucebeyond
